data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The site is designed to minimize decision time by limiting choices on main pages.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation bars and call-to-actions to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are optimized for target size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and spacing are adjusted for touch and cursor-based interaction.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Content is structured in chunks to enhance comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Content broken into sections with headings and subheadings.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focus on key features that bring the majority of user benefits.
data.technical_spec: Prioritization of tools and features used most frequently.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design consistency across the platform for enhanced user familiarity.
data.technical_spec: Adhering to common web conventions and navigation patterns.
